1.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 1, 10, 19, or 28 of any month, your psychic number is 1 and you’re ruled by the radiant Sun. Sun makes you a born leader, it makes your presence felt wherever you go & it won’t be wrong to say that you're the life of the party.
Oozing confidence comes naturally and easily to you. You have high self-esteem and are quite ambitious. You are bold and straightforward, and due to this people sometimes mistake you for being egoistic and arrogant, however, once they get to know you, they realize the warmth you have in your heart for the people around you and your kind spirit.
Just like your psychic number, you want to become number 1 in whatever you do and you also happen to become number 1 as you are stubborn in life, you are ready to burn the midnight oil and put in all your hard work to achieve your goals and dreams even at the cost of inconveniences and sacrifices.
Your triumph and accomplishments are what keep you going and alive. You can easily take up leadership roles in any sphere of your life and excel at it, be it your social circle, professional life, or personal. You are innovative and have a talent for using language in a charming, effective, and persuasive manner which attracts other people to you and they wish to listen to you. This is the reason why your friends and acquaintances come to you to seek advice. This boosts and motivates you and you also enjoy helping others. It gives you a sense of pride and keeps you propelled.
As you are ruled by the Sun which is the King in Numerology, you desire to live a royal lifestyle and with your efforts and uphill battle, you are also able to achieve it. You love spending money and spend it extravagantly to attain the luxuries and lavish lifestyle you wish and desire. Advice for you would be to keep a check on your savings and finances and not go over budget to achieve materialistic possessions.
You are always concerned and conscious about your public presence and your image. You enjoy being the center of attraction just like your ruling planet, ‘the Sun,’ it is also seen that you happen to be the center of attraction even when you do not desire or wish for it.
Psychic number 1 becomes a friend in need a friend indeed for their friends. You are ready to do anything for your close ones. You happen to be the center of attraction in your friend circle and workplace. You are known to carry a charismatic aura and a strong presence which attracts people toward you and creates curiosity in people to get to know you more. People around really enjoy spending time in your company and engaging in conversations with you.
You do not like to be dominated or told what to do as you want to live your life and do your things on your terms. In other words, we can say that you are a freedom lover and dislike intrusions and interventions in your life and your style of working. You believe in being your Boss.
To avoid discord and disturbances you must not dictate to others or let your authoritative nature overpower your relationship with others, especially with your family members and friends.
You possess a great deal of confidence which is phenomenal but do not let your overconfidence and ego drive your life in the wrong direction and cause distress and disagreements in your life. You indeed find it difficult to change your pe17rception and opinion, but you must try to understand the perspective1 of others rather than imposing your thought process and ideologies on them.
It is also seen that you tend to become discouraged and downhearted when you do not achieve what you desire, you are advised to accept delays and failures as it is all a part of life, a single event cannot decide your fate but a single failure can add a whole lot of experience to your life and put you on the path to success.
1.destiny_meaning: They might face disappointment, low phases, and setbacks during the period when Sun is weak like in October, November, and December. This period needs to be taken as an opportunity to develop patience, resilience, and courage

2.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 2, 11, 20, or 29 of any month, your psychic number is 2 and your ruling planet is the Moon. The moon shapes you to be very nurturing and caring, you care for others, their emotions, and their well-being. You are a sentimental person and are easily moved by the acts of moon kindness by others and are easily affected by the harsh words of people around you.
You possess a very calm and soothing personality; you love to be in harmony and wish the same for the world. Your sensitive and highly intuitive nature helps you tap into the emotions and feelings of others and understand feelings that cannot be expressed in words. People appreciate you for your motherly instincts and for taking care of those you love.
Peace is your love language and you dislike engaging in arguments and disagreements with not just your family members or friends but with anyone. You have a forgiving nature and easily forgive others for the mistakes they make or for how they hurt you, however big or grave their mistakes are.
You are peace-loving and are gifted with a heart that wishes well for every individual. You tend to help and be an emotional support for those around you, it is difficult for you to say no to others when they need you or your help. You intend to always form relationships that are meaningful and involve true emotions and feelings.
You are a loyal friend to your companions and leave no stone unturned to maintain harmonious relationships with your friends. People you are associated with should consider themselves lucky to have you in their life. People can view you as a person with whom they can have heart-to-heart conversations and have a shoulder to cry on.
You are an impeccable counselor and know how to make others feel loved and valued. You do not help those in need to become the center of attraction or to be in the spotlight but because of your big heart and generosity. You are also very romantic and selfless when involved in a love relationship
You just do not have a beautiful heart but tend to be physically attractive to others, you have a knack for aesthetics and know how to make things look gorgeous. You do good to others with the expectation of nothing in return. You tend to be family-oriented and devoted to their well-being and keeping everyone happy.
You are a dreamer who possesses imaginative and artistic qualities but often finds it difficult to put your plans into action or reality. If you find someone who you can rely on and trust to execute your ideas, it can work wonders for you.
Constant assurance can keep you motivated to do your job and excel at it. Although it could sometimes be difficult for you to ask for help given your shy nature. However, you must let go of the timidness you possess and reach out for guidance to others when required.
You can sometimes find it difficult to come to conclusions or make important decisions due to self-doubt and your fickle mind.
You try to avoid quarrels and controversies by accepting what others have to say and you do not let your true feelings or the harsh reality out in front of others which makes you very emotional for suppressing and keeping your feelings to yourself.
As the waning and waxing period of your ruling planet moon, you too go through emotional ups and downs in your life. You can tend to be extremely moody and your sentiments mostly overpower you.
2.destiny_meaning:
Destiny number (DN) 2 is ruled by the planet Moon
The moon represents emotions, attractiveness, and rapid change.
People with DN as 2 are family-oriented and love their families. It would be right to say that family is everything to them - be it the family they belong to or their own family that includes their children and spouse.
Moon is the fastest-moving planet as per astrology, and since it is related to emotions, its rapid change affects the emotions of people with destiny number 2 making them emotional and sensitive.
They take a keen interest in domestic affairs and they also have very strong family ties.
They prefer to treat people the same way they would like to be treated.
People with DN as 2 are peace lovers and they avoid fights.
People with Destiny Number 2 are believed to possess a great sense of self-respect and try to be mannerly under all circumstances.
They might face swings in their lives, leading to rapid thick and thins, and experiencing opportunities pass them right by when success is within sight.
Men with Destiny Number 2
They are fortunate in getting the love and support of women in their families, workplace, and women who hold high positions in their communities.
They are seen to have righteous mothers.
They end up marrying attractive women.
They may love plants and wish to decorate and redecorate their houses often.
Their first serious relationship or marriage might not last long.
Women with Destiny Number 2
Mostly they are very attractive and love to wear charming clothes and accessories that make them look further attractive
They are devoted to their life partners.
Women with DN 2 find themselves getting overemotional in their relationships, and getting affected by minor incidents. It is due to the ever-changing motion of the moon.
DN 2 women are very strong, they would cry but they are resilient in taking care of themselves.
Unfortunately, they get blamed for things they did not do.
When it comes to art, people with Destiny number 2 are known to rule that space. They could be great performers, painters, actors, singers, poets, hosts, and dancers. Once they embark on the art field, they tend to grasp knowledge quickly.
A feeling of helplessness might seep into them automatically after a setback. It is majorly seen in romantic relationships which leads to insecurity.
It is not wise to say that heartbreak is unavoidable for people with DN as 2, but it has been commonly observed
People with Destiny Number Two make invaluable doctors, psychologists, therapists, marriage counselors, and in any field where healing of mind, body, or relationships is required.
Past the age of 35, they may develop a deep inclination toward the occult sciences and religious beliefs.
The Moon being the destiny master, demands acknowledgment of emotions. No matter what the field of study is or the nature of the job or line of business is - acknowledging others’ emotions and respecting them will lead to miracles beyond your imagination.

3.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 3rd, 12th, 21st, or 30th of any month, your psychic number is 3 and your ruling planet is ‘Jupiter’.
You are known to be extremely ambitious, by your very own will, and are self-motivated. It will not be wrong to say that hard work gives you pleasure. If you do not work hard, you feel something is missing or as if you are not giving it your 100 percent. You thrive for bigger things and accomplishments in your professional life and cannot see yourself settling for subordinate positions.
You want to achieve one thing after the other, and you also make it happen given your devotion, discipline, and commitment to your work. Your dedication is a result of not wanting to see struggles in your life that you might have had to face in your early professional years. Psychic number 3 individuals start their careers early and might have to face hardship during that time which sets them up for success in the future. It shapes you to face any obstacle and learn how to overcome situations and come out as a winner.
You learn how to deal with people around you and how to handle situations. You just do not have time to work but also to play. You are social and cheerful and like to engage in conversations with people. You are also known to have a good sense of humor.
You are religious and have faith in God or as some call it ‘the Supreme Power’, you may or may not show it to the world but in your heart, you believe in cosmic energy. You like to express yourself with gestures, light humored jokes and love the attention you get because of it. It would be correct to say you like to be in the spotlight and be the center of attraction for all good reasons which are, your efforts and your endeavors.
You are valued for your optimism and for how well you can manage everything. You maintain your personal life equally enjoyable and vivid, however, it is seen that sometimes you find it difficult to draw the line between personal and professional lives which in turn disturbs your work-life balance
You can multitask and are great at it. You can perform, manage, and organize several tasks, meetings, responsibilities, and home duties at the same time but your inclination from time to time is more towards your professional life than your personal life.
In your personal life, you are an extremely caring and loving individual who wants to provide for their family and loved ones. In relationships, you give all you possibly can to make your partner feel loved and secure, however, sometimes your partner will also have to experience your bossy and dictatorial nature.
You happen to do the same with your family members as you intend to have everything under your control be it at work or home, which can be a cause of concern at times. You must learn to keep your authoritative nature in check when dealing with family members and loved ones.
You have mastered the art of communicating and expressing yourself in the most politically correct way to get things done or to defend yourself
You can easily take up a leadership role, become an orator, an advisor, a teacher, or a writer. You would see yourself having immense growth in such areas where people learn from you and your art of explanation and dictatorship.
You are articulate, fluent, and coherent with your words. Sometimes, you can be very straight forward which can often offend people, although you can be short-tempered, you know very well how to deal with such circumstances.
When talking about your life partner, your life partner is attractive and loyal to you. You may have physical relationships with your partner having psychic numbers 1,3,6 or 9 before marriage. It is seen that psychic number 3 is respectful towards their partners and does not tend to misbehave.
You must pay attention and give time to your family members and loved ones. It is good to be ambitious but it is not good to be over-ambitious and impatient to achieve success. Other things to keep in mind and improve upon are your excessive optimism and extravagance.
It is seen that psychic number 3 usually exaggerates the truth and creates false realities, and fabricates stories or gossip which can put them in trouble, limiting this could help you eradicate problems from your life and save you from overthinking. Adding to that, restraining yourself from being too authoritative can ease things in life.
3.destiny_meaning: Value addition can be at any scale and of any magnitude. It can be from teaching someone to do a job better or beautifying a product to changing the structure of a business altogether to add value to it.

4.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 4th, 13th, 22nd, or 31st of any month, your psychic number is 4 and your ruling planet is ‘Rahu’.
You are known to be rebellious and someone who is very practical and analytical in your approach toward your life. You are also extremely organized which could be seen by how you manage activities in your day-to-day life, how you maintain your house, and your professional life and bring discipline to it. You are extremely hard working and use your brain to its fullest when performing your job.
(Unique and out-of-the-box ideas)
You are pragmatic and you do not believe in anything until you are given the logic behind it, you need to be given proper reasoning behind everything, until then you restrict yourself from believing the theory presented to you.
You may find yourself having a different opinion about things than people around you and you tend to stand firm by your opinion and thought process and are not ready to change your perspective. Due to your stubborn nature and your outlook on finding logic and practicality in everything in life, you are often misunderstood by not only your acquaintances but also your family and friends which could strain your relationships with them.
You are a strong individual with a point of view and mind of your own. Although you do not wish to hurt the sentiments of others, you may find people being offended by your bold and straightforward nature. You love your family and friends, however, you do not even spare them when they go against you or do not agree with your perspective. Although you tend to build frustration in your mind due to the constant ups and downs in your life, you can get through it without much struggle, thanks to your ruling Planet Rahu which makes you bold and courageous.
You are a very helpful and kind-hearted person, but it becomes difficult for those around you to understand this given your harsh nature towards them when you try to prove a point, but that’s just how you are, you cannot sugarcoat words or be diplomatic, especially with your near and dear ones. Your friends tend to be confused about your personality and are often in a dilemma if you like them or not. This trait of yours often leads you to feel lonely and isolated.
You do not have a big social circle and have very few friends but you choose quality over quantity when it comes to friendship, you love to spend time with people who genuinely understand you and accept you the way you are.
You have a purposeful approach to life and do not tend to do things for the sake of it but with your whole heart, meaning, and determination. It is seen that people with psychic number 4 are not money-minded, you are more inclined towards gaining more knowledge and experience through your work inclined towards gaining more knowledge and experience through your work.
It does not mean that you do not value money or do not want to earn it, but it is to say money is not a priority for you. Of course, you enjoy spending money to fulfill your wishes and desires and for helping those in need. You have a big heart and cannot see people in need go unnoticed.
If you are given the position to bring change and revolution in your workplace, home, social or communal spheres, or in the world in general, you can prove to be a great revolutionary. You have an answer for everything and tend to shut down others with your thoughts and ideas. It will not be wrong to say it’s difficult to win over you in arguments and debates.
You are known to support the scapegoat and take a stand for them. You are self-made, you have always done hard work by your own will, and because of your destiny, you had to go through a lot of struggles to reach where you are today, you understand what others in such positions can feel, thus you support them, like mentioned before, you are someone with a very helping nature and you do want to support those around you.
It is imperative that you listen to the opinion of other people and try to understand their perspective rather than imposing your thought process on the masses, also try avoiding the use of harsh and hurtful words to win over an argument. Sometimes being flexible and understanding of others can solve things faster than you can imagine.
You are advised to choose friends and partners whose psychic numbers are 1, 6, or 7 as you are seen to get along well with them and they understand you. Psychic numbers 2 and 5 are also seen to be compatible with your psychic number 4. Avoid romantic or business partnerships with individuals with psychic numbers 4 and 8 as they will not yield any positive results, rather it might cause you trouble and misery.
4.destiny_meaning:
You are clever and adept at reading between the lines. You highly likely comprehend the original motives and intentions of others by merely having a conversation with them.
It’s rather unfortunate that people often misunderstand you. You try to convey one thing, but they interpret it wrongly. This misunderstanding makes it utterly difficult to be in their good graces. This is the chief reason why you may find yourself ending up with only a handful of friends after a certain age, or find it hard to make friends.
You are careful, proactive, and like to plan things ahead of time.
You are practical and your pragmatic approach brings favorable results. At times, being excessively practical with others puts you in the backseat, especially if they don’t match the level of your practicality. In such situations, you would find it wise to stop the practical hold a bit for your benefit.
Rahu is a mischievous and dynamic planet that never likes to stay in one place. It shows its influence on various aspects of your life. Here are the majors:
You would find yourself making big career plans for the future, but end up doing something entirely different.
You would feel something is always missing in life, you cannot put your finger on it, even when you have everything you need.
Rahu brings disappointment in at least one facet of your life. If you are disappointed with your profession, you would realize that you keep on switching fields and hopping firms in pursuit of a more productive work environment and more congenial colleagues.
Health issues become a concern as well.
Although you have the stamina to tackle physical work, you would find that your physical labor gets unnoticed. In numerology, Rahu is considered just a head with no body. Rahu makes it almost certain that the output of brain activity is far superior and appreciated than the result of any physical activity.
As Rahu doesn’t stay put, it affects your focus, you would notice that you are most productive when focused, but you’ll find your focus fluttering frequently.
Rahu is known to be highly fickle and destroys masterplans. If you notice impedance and disruption in your plans, this is the reason.
You may miss out on opportunities because of your sceptical nature, it’s understandable that past experiences of misunderstandings led you here.
Unavoidable additional responsibilities and duties are likely to come your way.
In numerology, the number 4 also represents unconventional ways, revolutions, and challenging existing notions, and desires. The world would not be what it is if such people were not there to dispute existing norms and bring revolutions, hence transforming the world completely.
Understand that your transforming ideas and unconventional ways may meet with rejection and criticism - it is heartbreaking but common.
The best way to get the most out of your destiny is by adopting ways consistent with what your Destiny Number demands. That is:
The more you rely and utilize on your brain over brawn, the faster you accomplish your goals.
Resort to criticism and bluntness only when it’s required.
Maintain focus and do activities that enforce your focus. The results will be nothing short of a miracle.

5.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 5th, 14th, or 23rd of any month, your psychic number is 5 and your ruling planet is ‘Mercury’.
You carry childlike energy and aura around you. You enjoy the little moments in life and love to see and make those around you happy. Your idea of happiness is making others smile, entertaining them, and being entertained yourself.
It is seen that individuals with a psychic number 5 adapt to any situation with ease. Your behavior with people is just as you assume people like you to be and this trait of yours is highly appreciated by those around you. Behaving like a child with a child and mature when the situation requires. You are very versatile in this sphere. You intend to create a jovial environment around yourself. You are good-looking, attractive, and look younger than your age which makes other people get drawn toward you.
You are a great communicator and possess exemplary communication skills. You can convince people easily as you have a way with words and your charming personality adds more power to it. You can run a successful business with the oratory skills you have and your risk-taking ability. Your mind is always working on learning about different ways and sources of earning and investing money which is a boon for you.
You are inquisitive and prove to be a lifelong learner, you have a love for learning new things but given your dynamic nature, you do not tend to stick to one thing to be able to master it. Things start to disinterest you very quickly. If these individuals are into a job profile, they could be seen switching jobs, if their present job turns out to be boring or not so challenging for them, they would not think twice before changing their company. They are enthusiastic and dislike monotonous work routines and desire action in their life.
It is seen that individuals with a psychic number 5 are seen to have multiple sources of income and do not stick to having just one business if they are into Business as they crave diversity and variety.
You are popular among your social circle, and friends around you seek your advice, however, when you require help or suggestions you would find that you do not get the right advice, due to this you tend to isolate and distance yourself from you. In your younger years, you have a bigger friend circle, nevertheless, over time your social circle becomes smaller and smaller.
In the later years, it is also seen that you distance yourself from your peers to protect your peace given that you had already faced betrayals from friends and partners in your younger years.
You are highly intuitive and can sense other people’s true intentions. You must have experienced telling your friends or family that someone doesn’t hold the right intentions for you or them and it would have later turned out to be as you said. If you practice meditation, you can further master the art of intuition.
An impeccable trait about you is that you never give up, however bad the situation may be, you always bounce back, come back stronger and face the aftermath of your challenges and struggles with a smile.
A few things that you must keep in mind as a native of psychic number 5 is not to let laziness overpower you, being lethargic could lead to weight gain. You must also keep a check on your expenses, you love acquiring whatever you set your eye on; however, it is important not to bring financial instability into your life. It is seen that you have anger issues, although they are short-lived, try to keep your anger in control
5.destiny_meaning:
You are likely to get Favors from your relatives and friends, your government, people in authority, and politically-connected individuals.
You will find yourself getting inspired frequently by successful people. You do not shy away from emulating their ideas and techniques in your life to improve results. It makes you knowledgeable too.
A few things to keep in mind to get the best out of your destiny number
DN 5 produces brilliant ideas, if they are channeled in the wrong avenues, you may find yourself indulging in gambling, fast-money-making ways, and manipulating others for personal gain.
As your mind is always suffused with ideas, overuse of it might lead to headaches and stomach-related issues. You would want to take a break or a day off now and then to take good care of your health.
As you prefer to keep everything interesting, you may find yourself getting bored easily. This can be seen in your relationships as well. You may want to monitor it consciously and keep your relationships healthy
In numerology, 5 is considered the most powerful number. It has honored the world with pioneers, discoverers, inventors, and world-transforming business personalities. As a Destiny Number, 5 is a blessing. You would want to be a part of that list.

6.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 6th, 15th, or 24th of any month, your psychic number is 6 and your ruling planet is ‘Venus’.
You are beautiful, youthful, and have a magnetic aura. You talk to people with respect and etiquette and this attracts people towards you. It is very normal for psychic number 6 to keep their surroundings neat and clean and add a flavor of artistic things in their house and workplace. Aesthetics play a significant role in your life.
You admire and adore beauty, it would be wrong to say that you are just attracted to the outer beauty of people, as you also appreciate the beauty of one’s heart. You are extremely helpful and kind and are ready to sacrifice anything and everything for the well-being of your loved ones and to support them. You are family oriented and cherish spending time and sharing moments of joy with your loved ones.
You listen to your heart more than to your head. You are emotionally driven and hypersensitive. You can easily be disturbed by the harsh words of others and lose your peace of mind on petty things. It’s difficult for you to find true friends in life who wish the best for you, especially during the later years of your life. Because of your giving nature, sometimes people take advantage of you and leave you, in such situations you find yourself to be lonely.
You are honest in your dealings with others but in return being cheated by others gives you extreme trust issues and therefore you isolate yourself from the world.
You enjoy luxury and have a royal taste in fashion and brands. Wearing elegant clothing, using fragrances that add a unique touch to your personality, and looking presentable at all given times are a necessity for you. It brings you joy and makes you feel content
To manage your lifestyle, you spend a hefty amount on shopping. There is a high possibility that you are a shopaholic and leave no chance to buy the latest trends. This is therapy for you. If now, you do not have the means to cherish this, you find joy in dressing up and making the best use of what is already available to you.
You are a true empath who feels for people and shares their sorrows, pains, love, and laughter. You possess motherly instincts and not only care for your family but also for your friends and acquaintances. You are fond of children because of their innocence and playful nature. You also adore animals and love spending time with furry friends and finding solace in them. Music can result to be therapeutic where you find comfort and make space for yourself to feel and process your own emotions.
In love relationships, it is observed that psychic number 6 individuals fall in love at least twice before tying the knot. You crave love from your partner but often it is seen that psychic number 6 does not get the same efforts and emotions in return as they invest in their partner.
You must learn to draw boundaries and not devote yourself completely to the service of others. Learn to love yourself first. Self-love can immensely help you in facing the extreme emotions you feel. Due to being dejected, there is a possibility that you might indulge in consumption of alcohol and smoking, remember these are harmful to your health and weak bodies, you must limit the consumption of such substances if you happen to consume them. In addition, keep a check on your unnecessary lavish expenses. You are highly prone to the evil eye; it is suggested that you do not share your plans and goals with others until it comes to fruition.
6.destiny_meaning:
If you are a woman, you would find Destiny Number 6 influencing your life a great deal with its effects. The major ones are mentioned below
DN 6 is more favorable to you than it is to men.
You always look younger than your years. No matter the age, you naturally take care of your beauty and maintain it. It becomes a common thing for you to get appreciated for your looks.
You would experience that if you did not get married in your early life, it becomes rather hard to find the right partner to get married to in the later years.
It is beautiful to love someone with every fiber of your being and cater to every whim of theirs. It is so unfortunate that humans are designed to slacken interest if no mystery is left in that thing. They do not value it as much and may feel claustrophobic in the relationship. Going against your instincts could be difficult, but you would find that letting a few things go, giving space, and not sharing every minute detail could keep the magic in the relationship alive.
If you are a man with Destiny Number 6, sexual problems may come your way. You may want to be cautious and opt for precautionary methods while pursuing sexual endeavors.
A few things to keep in mind to get the most out of your destiny number:
Your destiny number wants to shower you with luxury, so it is okay to buy luxurious items even if have to wait a while to obtain them. That works consistently with your destiny number’s demand. It will reward you with more luxury. Please draw a line between getting the luxurious items that you require and splurging recklessly.
Whatever you do, add beauty to it to make it look luxurious. For instance, if you sell a product, make it look luxurious; if you provide a service, make sure it is of superior quality and upscale.
You may find that you do not have considerable savings in the bank by maintaining an upscale lifestyle. It is an attribute of DN 6. You may want to focus on acquiring assets than growing your bank balance.

7.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 7th, 16th, or 25th of any month, your psychic number is 7 and your ruling planet is ‘Ketu’.
You are ruled by a magical number 7 and a mysterious planet ‘Ketu’. You possess a calm and composed demeanor with a big heart. You are attentive and care for your family and friends and find joy in helping others and can also be an animal lover.
You are a reserved person and take your sweet time to open up to others. It is seen that most people ruled by psychic number 7 are introverts and live in a world of their own in their heads. As you do not tend to gel up with others in the initial phases, others assume you to be rude or arrogant, however, this isn’t the reality. Once people get to know you, they realize the golden heart you possess. You are always ready to be of service to others, whether it is emotionally or financially, but a piece of advice for you is not to go overboard with this characteristic of yours.
You are an intuitive soul and you must listen to your heart. You have an interest in things that cannot be seen or understood by the naked eye. Occult sciences like Astrology, Numerology, Tarot, witchcraft practices, and mysterious things interest you. You often experience in your life where you have a feeling that something is about to happen and it occurs or takes place. If you haven’t experienced this yet, there is a high probability that you will in this lifetime.
You also tend to comprehend people's true intentions towards you and others and are a good judge of character. You are gifted with a strong sixth sense and can activate and enhance it with routine meditation practice. If you wish to practice it, you must start with guided meditations that are easily available on the internet, and for further learning and deep understanding of the topic, you are recommended to seek a ‘Guru’ and learn under their guidance. You have the innate gift of learning, understanding, and committing yourself to this subject with the utmost ease and simplicity.
Psychic number 7 ruled individuals are known to be exceptional healers and teachers, people find solace and comfort in talking to you and sharing about their lives and problems with you. Therefore, you can also choose to be in a profession where you will have to deal with and consult people, like teachers, consultants, and psychiatrists. Being in artistic fields and politics is also proven to be advantageous for you.
You are a curious being and take delight in researching and learning about new things, you are inquisitive about different aspects of life, including spirituality and life in general. This could help you make a great career in the research field, all thanks to your keen mind. You find pleasure in doing activities and research in which you have to go deep in its understanding and get to its root cause not to find logic and reasonings but to gain more knowledge and connections.
You are a sensitive, spiritual, and introspective person. You value family and prefer spending time with them, your home holds a lot of value in your heart and life. You do not prefer to socialize a lot and find discomfort engaging in conversations in large group settings, first because you enjoy being at home in your comfort zone and second because you struggle with low self-esteem and lack confidence.
Although, you are a different person who oozes confidence and high spirit when around people in your close-knitted circle who appreciate and love you for who you are.
You must try to keep your anxiety and stress in control by doing some physical activity, going out in nature for a walk, or spending time with your comfort person. Building tension in your head and not releasing it will lead you to overthinking scenarios, being a sensitive person yourself, it becomes extremely difficult for you to deal with them and overcome them
Do not allow your mind to play with you by sitting on the problems, it will otherwise make you a victim of your negative thought patterns and the assumptions you make in your mind. You live in a world of your own and are lost in it. You tend to get restless and become moody due to a lot of worrying. Train your mind to live in the present and not wander into the past or the future. Constant thinking about the past and apprehensions about the future make you nervous.
Do not escape your reality and be determined to confront it. Remember, you are the creator and the master of your destiny, shape it with positivity. Surround yourself with people who bring you joy and distance yourself from negative environments to avoid overselling your emotions. You must engage in some sort of meditation to manage your thoughts and calm your mind.
7.destiny_meaning:
As ruled by Destiny Number 7, marital and romantic relationship problems sometimes become inevitable. Your destiny may also put you in situations where chances of affairs outside the relationship become a possibility. It has been seen in the case of DN 7 that if people get married after 28, they are more likely to enjoy a successful marriage.
If you are a woman, you would find Destiny Number 7 influencing your life with its attributes. The major ones are mentioned below:
It likely makes you very sociable; you enjoy talking to others.
You are attractive, intelligent, clever, but sometimes sentimental too.
Being career-oriented and assertive in your approach could be how you perceive yourself.
Family ties are important to you. You would find that you bond fast and very well with other women in your family, friend circles, and workplace
If you have been told that you are not as romantic, it’s because of the DN 7.
DN 7 prolifically produces highly successful individuals
in the field of spirituality, mental health, teaching,
dispute resolution, and diplomatic affairs.

8.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 8th, 17th, or 26th of any month, your psychic number is 8 and your ruling planet is ‘Saturn’.
You are an incredibly hard-working individual who is disciplined and possesses a focused mindset and determination toward your goals and ambitions. You are ruled by the planet of ethics, discipline, rules, regulations, concentration, justice, and delays. Thus, you must imbibe and accept these traits in your life.
Although you would move heaven and earth in all your tasks and work, you tend to see slow growth and results per the hard labor you put in. It is observed that people ruled by psychic number 8 attain success after a lot of blood, sweat, and tears as your ruling planet Saturn happens to delay and move things slowly in your life, whether that be in your professional or personal life. This is the attribute of your date of birth and to achieve success in life, you must accept it wholeheartedly.
You are a resilient human being who can bounce back even after the most horrific failures in life and do not give up, this is because of the immense courage and mental strength you are gifted with. Just keep in mind that the universe is testing you and if you stay strong and face all these adversities, you will prosper, shine and flourish in your life as you are capable of it and you will witness a humongous success and victory as a result of your hard labor, it will not be an immediate success but if you stay true to yourself and your work, you will be a recipient of a gigantic win.
Making tenacity one of your principal traits in life can help you sail smoothly and move toward your goals with more ease. For you, “Hard work is the key to Success” and unfortunately not luck does not play a major role in obtaining the triumph you desire. Place your trust in yourself and make optimum use of your potential as you are a blessed soul.
You are a kind and generous soul who has enormous love and care for your near and dear ones and wants to provide them with emotional and material support. However, you emphasize more on your career and stepping up the ladder in your professional life to gain that material success for yourself and your loved ones that you tend to neglect the care and affection they require sometimes. Nevertheless, when someone needs your help, you do support them with all your heart but you would find yourself alone when you seek assistance and plead for help. Unfortunately, people do not shower you with the love you deserve.
You have high standards of professionalism and desire to have everything under control and finish your tasks on time. If you set your focus on something, you ensure to complete it effectively and not leave it imperfect or abort it. You are detail-oriented and thus occasionally can be slow in completing an assignment as you wish to be as careful as possible to not miss even a minute detail. Nonetheless, you can multitask at the same time.
You are great at managing, organizing, and planning things. Psychic number 8 is known to be a quintessential money manager. Saturn also rules land, property, law, and order, so if you would like to make your career in any of the related fields, it will prove to be beneficial for you.
You are very fond of fitness and sports and could be involved in doing physical activities.
However, if you are not, you must start doing something that physically exerts you, it could be as simple as routinely playing a basic sport, dancing, yoga, jogging, or going for weekend hikes. You often contemplate your future, career, struggles, hindrances, and slow growth. In such a case, working out can help you focus your energy in the right direction and divert your mind as much as you can. You are prone to depression due to these constant thoughts and overthinking, thus redirecting your mind toward fitness is of vital importance
A few psychic number 8 natives due to not receive the due credit for their work and are backstabbed by the people they trust the most, and other unfortunate events turn bitter and become revengeful. However, if Saturn ruled individuals cheat other people or involve themselves in illegal activities, Saturn takes absolutely no time in punishing them gravely. You must avoid engaging yourself in such activities and stay consistent and determined with your goals in life. Being corrupt or doing injustice is not at all an option.
To understand one's life better, it is of great significance that you understand your ruling planet. In your case, it is Saturn. If you have seen the image of your ruling planet, Saturn, it has a ring around it, that ring is dust, and inside the ring is the planet. The message here is to reach somewhere in life and to attain a position, you will have to go through a fair share of ups and downs before experiencing stability in life. Do not complain about not having luck or how slow successful events unfold in your life, Saturn asks you to have patience and stay dedicated to being able to experience the magic it will bestow upon you.
8.destiny_meaning:
You would find that delays, obstacles, failures, and sometimes humiliation, become a part of your life. It is the supreme quality of Saturn to put you through it. This quality also makes you experience unpredictable changes that lead to a challenging life. Unlike others, you do not crack under pressure. By contrast, you perform your best under pressure. Others look up to you to take charge of undesirable and unfavorable situations. The harder the situation, the stronger you emerge from it.
The wisdom you possess is the product of the hardships and tough experiences you went through and fought off.
In numerology, 8 also denotes money and power. It gives you the strength to assume high positions in public and private organizations, politics, and any field of work, for that matter. Hard work does not get unnoticed. Your destiny ascertains that
DN 8 blesses you with most of your share of wealth in your early thirties or mid-thirties.
DN 8 also brings financial losses through fraud, theft, embezzlement, and swindling.
You would want to be cautious with legal cases, motor accidents, and early signs of aging.
DN 8 also provides a strong inclination toward occult sciences. You would also realize the more spiritual you get, the better the results in your life
If you find yourself losing faith in God or not believing in luck, it’s a legitimate feeling which is a result of constant hurdles, inexplicable losses, non-fruition of goals, and decisions that led to the tumbling of financial plans. You become impervious to these factors, and they don’t surprise you anymore.
As a human being, the chief reason for indulging in narcotic activities and intoxication is followed by a prolonged stage of disappointment, frustration, and dejection. As ruled by DN 8, you may find these activities appealing and are tempted to opt for them. Nevertheless, it is always your choice how to respond to such cravings.
Being cognizant of your destiny number attributes may help you conceive a broader picture and help you learn that a better future is bound to happen post the current perpetuating phase.
Solitude could be a tormenting factor in the initial phase, but you would embrace it in the later phases of your life and it would be a way of life.
You might find problems, rejections, opposition, stress, hurdles, and humiliation as your co-passengers in your life journey.
Romantic endeavors may not bring you a lot of success primarily because you would be busier working towards your goals. It also becomes a reason for turbulent married life which sometimes leads to separation and even divorce. It is rather unfortunate, but you may get the feeling of drawing yourself from the relationship or marriage and find peace elsewhere.
If you are a woman, you would find Destiny Number 8 influencing your life with its attributes greatly. The major ones are mentioned below:
You would probably inherit or accumulate property or estate. Unfortunately, this property may face disputes. You may want to be on your toes to protect it.
Selling and buying real estate may become the safest and fastest way to earn money in the later years for you.
It is Destiny Number 8 that plods the process of getting you the right life partner. It is also DN 8 that ascertains that you end up meeting your perfect fit.
You would dedicate your life to taking care of your family. It is rather unfortunate that you would see turbulence and hardships in your married life - that’s primarily from not your side.
You would have a strong inclination toward spirituality and a stronger faith in God post-marriage. Listen to your heart.
If you are a man with Destiny Number 8, it will likely make you not respect your partner or spouse the way they deserve it. It would be wise to evaluate the relationship and have a pleasant perspective on it. If not salvaged in time, this could be the main reason for your turbulent married life.
A few things to take into consideration to make the best use of Destiny Number 8:
Try hard to keep bad habits at bay and work smartly.
Taking big risks has resulted in sudden failure in the past. It is time to try something else but it is never a time to give up. Uproot greed from your endeavors, and you would find the key to success.
Legal matters will try to entangle you, perhaps on more than one occasion. Remain vigilant and understand it is a phase where doing anything crass and reckless would win the situation
As you are ruled by Saturn, it rewards you with great planning skills. You are adept at planning events, functions, and programs.
No matter how much delay DN 8 causes, it has the power to make you successful at a grand level.
You may want to work jointly with people who are favorable to your Destiny and Psychic Numbers, it produces immense success
“I don’t know why I scarcely get time for leisure activities” - you may find yourself narrating this often. It’s the hard work that keeps you occupied throughout your life.
Number 8 has built you differently. It has enforced you to withstand the pressure that no other number can. And, that makes you enormously powerful.
You are programmed to demonstrate the greatest quality of endurance.
You are wired to change the world with your hard work.
DN 8 leads you to create a history and do something that never has been done. It blesses the world with innovators, social reformers, innovators, and prolific wealth creators.

9.psychic_meaning:
If you are born on the 9th, 18th, or 27th of any month, your psychic number is 9 and your ruling planet is ‘Mars’.
You are ruled by the red fiery planet which makes you charismatic and a powerhouse of energy. You enjoy activities that require you to be physically active, for example, sports, gym, dancing, swimming, yoga, and any other activity on similar lines. With this immense energy of yours, comes authority, domination, and control. You are someone who needs to have everything under your control and in no way possible can be dominated by others, rather you have a habit of commanding and dictating other people around you.
Because of these traits, it is observed that people governed by psychic number 9 are mostly in professions such as sports, politics, soldiers, IAS officers, boxers, etc.
If you do not choose professions that require your physical strength and settle for desk jobs, then you want to be in leading positions where you command, dictate, and give orders at your workplace. However, if you do not get the opportunity to be in a dominant and prominent position, you become frustrated about it, find discomfort in your work, and have to face mental anguish. You do not like to be told what to do and dislike interference in your work.
However, psychic number 9 is not all about dominance, power, and authority. You are a humanitarian, a very loving and caring individual. If somebody wins your trust and makes their presence in your heart, you submit yourself to them. You are there for people who you love, but sometimes you become so devoted to others, especially your partner that you start to lose your individuality, so be careful about that. People can win you over with love and respect, on the other hand, if someone misbehaves with you, you don’t take much time in giving people a taste of their own medicine.
You are a straightforward individual who cannot manipulate things and be diplomatic, you interpret, process, and say things as they are. Diplomacy is not your strong pursuit and you disapprove of diplomatic people, which is why it is seen that psychic number 9 natives do not get along very well with psychic number 5, given that psychic number 5 is diplomatic and manipulative when they want to get things done.
Because of your direct and candid approach, sometimes people might assume your comments and statements to be rude and unpleasant.
Psychic number 9 is known for their anger, you are short-tempered and any unjust practice can make you furious. With age, you learn to manage your outrage and convey your message more wisely but life experiences still do not make you diplomatic, it is quite difficult that it becomes your innate quality. You are bold, courageous, and full of confidence, therefore, you do not fear to present things as they are, even if it makes others your enemies.
You are punctual and disciplined and have a routine and regimen in your personal and professional life. You do not prefer going with the flow, rather you like to have a sense of direction and regulation in your life. This trait of yours can make you a great leader. It is recommended that psychic number 9 should opt for being in a profession where they can be their boss, which could be running their own business. Artistic fields also suit you well, acting, singing, and dancing. You are good-looking and charming individuals which could be a boon if you are interested in the entertainment industry.
You are also known to be secretive and do not share about your personal life. You prefer not disclosing details about your upcoming projects and future goals with others and choose to keep things under wraps until it comes to fruition. You are not someone who will share your heart and let people know about your feelings and low moments in life.
You present as if everything in your life is under control even when it is not, this is due to your high-self esteem, you do not want to be seen as a weak personality. Even people close to you sometimes do not know the real you. It is suggested that you find someone who you can trust completely and find solace in, suppressing feelings and emotions is not good for your mental health.
A few things you must take note of, given your excessive energy, you must involve yourself in physical activities and sports so that you can direct your energy into the right place, otherwise it might take the form of frustration and cause quarrels. Psychic number 9 is prone to fights and outbursts which could further lead to serious situations like accidents or court cases. Be extra cautious in this sector of your life. Practice meditation as it can help you calm your mind and energies.
9.destiny_meaning:
What is a Master Number in Numerology?
The numbers 11, 22, and 33 are Master Numbers, meaning they come with powerful positives and negatives. The single-digit numbers are often what get the most attention, but double-digit numbers hold all the power.
According to numerology, a Master Number can mean difficulty but also great strength, so having a MASTER NUMBER in your DOB can change the game for you.
If you can learn to take control of the curve balls these master numbers send you, you can have a productive and prosperous life.
How To Calculate Master Numbers
Convert your birth month to one digit.
May = 5.
Convert your day of birth to one digit.
18 = 1 + 8 = 9.
Convert your birth year to one digit.
1970 = 1 + 9 + 7 + 0 = 17. 1 + 7 = 8.
Add the total numbers from each group.
+ 9 + 8 = 22
Destiny number, or Master Number 22.
